💡 Pro Tips for Better Loyalty

  • ✓ Keep it simple: 5 visits for a free item works great
  • ✓ Make it valuable: Reward should be worth 2-3x the regular cost
  • ✓ Celebrate wins: Tell customers when they're close to earning a reward
  • ✓ Update regularly: Refresh rewards every month to keep it interesting
